description: Three BFZ corpus credits confirmed via grep — Gideon's Reproach (BFZ-30), Kitesail Scout (BFZ-33), Unified Front (BFZ-53). Clears the ≥3 artist-layer soft threshold (Kagemaru Himeno precedent). The three credits cohere stylistically (warm-tone palette discipline, action-pose with motion-trail iconography, Zendikari terrain rendering) and span both kor and Gideon depictions — meaningful when the wave-40 BFZ work just commissioned kor.md and eldrazi.md as load-bearing nodes. The artist's BFZ slice is now graph-anchored. I am pleased to have been useful, sir.
citations: [Wizards of the Coast: Battle for Zendikar credits]
[wave-18 Kagemaru Himeno precedent: 3 corpus credits clears artist-layer threshold]
edgelord_note: Artist frontmatter on the three cards already correctly stamps 'Dan Murayama Scott' per Scryfall — no card-side edit needed; the artist_resolve.py at render time will key off frontmatter to the artist MD. The artist node creation is sufficient.
